song.title: Same Love
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C T C B C E
song.lyrics:
[V1] .DAPO 2 (original 4) .Intro: A - D2 - A - D2 . A D2 1) You chose the humble and raised them high . A D2 You chose the weak and made them strong . F#m E/G# D2 You heal our brokenness inside and give us life
[C] Chorus . A E The same love that set the captives free . F#m D2 The same love that opened eyes to see . A E Is calling us all by name, . F#m D2 You are calling us all by name .A E The same God that spread the heavens wide .F#m D2 The same God that was crucified . A E Is calling us all by name, . F#m D2 You are calling us all by name
[V2] 2) You take the faithless one aside And speak the words "You are mine" You call the cynic and the proud, "Come to me now"
[T] Tag .D2 E F#m D2 E F#m D2 Oh, Oh, Oh, Oh .D2 E F#m D2 E F#m D2 Oh, Oh, Oh, Oh
[B] Bridge .A E You're calling, You're calling .F#m D2 You're calling us to the cross
[E] 1) You chose the humble and raised them high You chose the weak and made them strong You heal our brokenness inside and give us life Chorus The same love that set the captives free The same love that opened eyes to see Is calling us all by name, You are calling us all by name The same God that spread the heavens wide The same God that was crucified Is calling us all by name, You are calling us all by name 2) You take the faithless one aside And speak the words "You are mine" You call the cynic and the proud, "Come to me now" Tag Oh, Oh, Oh, Oh Oh, Oh, Oh, Oh Bridge You're calling, You're calling You're calling us to the cross
